name: Buttermilk Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Fat grams per serving: Approx.
2. Cook Time: 0:15
Measure the first seven ingredients in a large bowl. Add the butter and cut it in until crumbly. Make a well in the center.
3. In a small bowl, beat the egg until frothy. Mix in the buttermilk. Stir with a fork to form a soft dough. Turn out on a lightly floured surface. Knead lightly 8-10 times.
4. Divide into two parts. Pat each part into a 6-inch circle. Place on greased baking sheet. Brush tops with milk. Sprinkle with sugar.
5. Score each top into 6 pie-shaped markings. Bake in a 425°F oven until risen and browned.
6. Serve hot with lots of butter.
NOTE: Raisins or currants may be added if desired.
